summary: Moves Blu-ray commands onto typed store methods, adds cache freshness hooks, export, and README cookbook examples.
reason: The scorecard under-credited hand-written workflows that used raw SQL and lacked generated freshness symbols, and users needed a local catalog snapshot command.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., and go test ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; manual search/export/help checks pass with a temp HOME; scorecard cache_freshness is 10/10.
